window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var popup = document.getElementById('popupModal');
  var closeBtn = document.getElementById('popupClose');
  if (!popup || !closeBtn) return;

  var KEY = 'popupShown';

  function open() {
    popup.style.display = 'flex';
    document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function close() {
    popup.style.display = 'none';
    sessionStorage.setItem(KEY, 'true');
    document.documentElement.style.overflow = '';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  if (!sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)) open();

  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', close);

  // Close on backdrop click (or clicking outside the card)
  popup.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    if (e.target === popup || (e.target.classList && e.target.classList.contains('popup-backdrop'))) {
      close();
    }
  });

  // ESC to close
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') close();
  });
});
</script>

  /* === Overlay container === */
  #popupModal {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0;
    display: none;                 /* JS switches to flex */
    z-index: 2147483000;           /* very high to beat toolbars/overlays */
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  
  /* Backdrop */
  #popupModal .popup-backdrop {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
    z-index: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  
  
  /* Card */
  #popupModal .popup-card {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    max-width: 880px;
    width: 92%;
    background: transparent;
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
    z-index: 1;

    padding: 32px;
    width: 56%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  #popupModal .popup-right {
    width: 44%;
    background: #111111;
  }
  #popupModal .popup-right img {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
  }
  
  /* Title */
  #popupModal .popup-title {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin: 0 0 20px 0;

    padding: 0;
    margin: 0 0 24px 0;

    position: relative;

    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  #popupModal .popup-checklist li::before {
    content: "✔";
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: #FFD43B;
    font-weight: bold;
  }
  
  /* CTA button */
  #popupModal .popup-cta {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 10px;
    padding: 12px 22px;

    color: #1A1A1A;

    font-weight: 700;
    text-decoration: none;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    transition: background 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease;
  }
  #popupModal .popup-cta:hover {
    background: #ffdf5d;
  }
  
  /* Close button */
  #popupModal .popup-close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 14px;
    right: 16px;
    border: none;
    background: transparent;
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #ffffff;
    cursor: pointer;
    z-index: 2;
  }
